name: Linked List Traversal
description: Move a pointer node by node until it becomes null.
exampleJava: Node curr = head; while (curr != null) { curr = curr.next; }
commonMistakes: Forgetting to move curr to curr.next
Stopping one node too early

name: Length of Linked List
description: Count nodes while traversing the list once.
exampleJava: int len = 0; while (curr != null) { len++; curr = curr.next; }
commonMistakes: Not handling an empty list
Incrementing count in the wrong place

name: Search in Linked List
description: Scan each node until the target value is found or the list ends.
exampleJava: while (curr != null) { if (curr.data == x) return true; curr = curr.next; }
commonMistakes: Returning false too early
Comparing the node itself instead of node.data

name: Head and Tail Update
description: Adjust the head or tail pointer carefully during insert and delete operations.
commonMistakes: Losing the old head
Not handling deletion when the list has one node

name: Delete Node
description: Reconnect the previous node to skip the node being removed.
commonMistakes: Not handling deletion at position 1
Walking past the node before the target

name: Reverse Linked List
description: Reverse the next pointers using previous, current, and next references.
exampleJava: while (curr != null) { Node next = curr.next; curr.next = prev; prev = curr; curr = next; }
commonMistakes: Losing the rest of the list before saving next
Returning the old head instead of prev

name: Middle of Linked List
description: Use fast and slow pointers so slow lands at the middle.
exampleJava: while (fast != null && fast.next != null) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; }
commonMistakes: Forgetting the fast.next null check
Using two full passes when the intended trick is one pass

name: Fast and Slow Pointers
description: Move one pointer twice as fast as the other to detect structure properties.
commonMistakes: Moving both pointers by one step
Missing null checks before fast.next.next

name: Cycle Detection
description: Detect whether fast and slow pointers meet inside a cycle.
commonMistakes: Comparing values instead of node references
Not stopping when fast reaches null

name: Merge Sorted Lists
description: Use a dummy node and tail pointer to stitch two sorted lists together.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to append the remaining nodes
Losing the dummy head reference

name: Remove Duplicates
description: Skip over repeated values in a sorted linked list.
commonMistakes: Advancing curr too early after deletion
Applying sorted-list logic to unsorted data
